name: OpenHands
description: OpenHands Agent Canvas is an AI software-development agent that reads and writes files, runs shell commands, and edits code. This installs the Agent Canvas CLI in full-canvas public mode, serving both the web UI and the agent backend.

notes.text: The agent server can read/write the container filesystem, run shell commands, and access the network. Treat the container as trusted infrastructure and do not expose port 8000 directly to the internet without a reverse proxy, VPN, or access-control layer.

Public mode requires a backend API key. A random LOCAL_BACKEND_API_KEY is generated at install and stored in /opt/openhands/agent-canvas.env; enter it in the browser when opening the Canvas. For remote access, put an ngrok tunnel, nginx+TLS reverse proxy, or OAuth gate in front of port 8000.
